managementDescription: View and manage your retirement plan enrollments across all available assets.
ineligibleContactHR: Not available for your current employment classification. Please contact HR for more information regarding eligibility requirements.
noPlansFound: No plans found matching the selected filter.
choosePlanHeading: Choose the plan that fits your future.
choosePlanSubtitle: Select the retirement option that aligns with your tax strategy and long-term goals.
choosePlanSubtitleStrategy: Select the plan that best fits your financial goals and tax strategy.
selectPlanSubtitle: Choose an option to see how it affects your future savings.
needHelpDecidingDesc: Not sure which plan is right for you? Our AI-powered comparison tool can help you understand the differences and make an informed decision.
roth401kDescFigma: Contribute after-tax dollars and enjoy tax-free withdrawals in retirement.
traditional401kDescFigma: Reduce your taxable income now with pre-tax contributions and pay taxes in retirement.
roth401kBenefit2: No required minimum distributions (RMDs) during your lifetime
roth401kBenefit3: Contributions can be withdrawn anytime without taxes or penalties
roth401kBenefit4: Estate planning benefits for your heirs
traditional401kBenefit1: Lower your current taxable income with pre-tax contributions
traditional401kBenefit4: Higher take-home pay compared to Roth
needHelpDeciding: Need help deciding? Our advisors are available to discuss which plan is right for your financial goals.
selectPlanToSeeDetails: Select a plan to see details.
planNotAvailableDefault: This plan is not available for your current profile.
bestForTaxFree: Best for tax-free growth over time.
solidOption: A solid option for your retirement savings.
excellentTaxFree: Excellent for growing your money tax-free.
betterPaycheck: Better for keeping more money in your paycheck today.
conNoTaxBreakToday: You don't get a tax break today
conPayTaxesWithdraw: You pay taxes when you take money out
planTraditional401kDesc: Contributions are made with pre-tax dollars, reducing your taxable income now. You'll pay taxes when you withdraw in retirement.
planRoth401kDesc: Contributions are after-tax. Withdrawals in retirement are tax-free.
planSafeHarborDesc: Employer contributions are immediately vested. No annual testing required.
designSavingsTitle: Make the most of your paycheck.
designSavingsSubtitle: Your contribution rate shapes your retirement outcome. Choose the level that aligns with your goals.
contributionPageSubtitle: Your contribution rate shapes your retirement outcome. Choose a level that aligns with your goals today and your future lifestyle.
whatThisMeansForPaycheck: What this means for your paycheck
splitContributionsTitle: How would you like to split your contributions?
splitContributionsSupporting: Choose how your contributions are divided between pre-tax and after-tax options.
startContributingToSeeProjection: Start contributing to see your projected growth.
howMuchContribute: How much do you wish to contribute?
contributionTitle: How much would you like to contribute?
contributionDollarAria: Contribution amount in dollars per month
setContributionSubtext: Choose how much to save for retirement
taxStrategySubtext: Choose how to split your contributions across different tax treatments.
aiInsightMatchEncourage: Contribute at least {{percent}}% to get the full employer match ({{amount}}/year).
aiInsightMatchConfirmation: You're getting the full employer match at {{percent}}% ({{amount}}/year).
aiInsightNotMaximizing: You are not maximizing employer match.
aiInsightAboveMatch: You are contributing above the match.
aiInsightAnnualFreeMoney: Full match is {{amount}}/year in free money.
assumesReturnInflation: Assumes {{return}}% return, {{inflation}}% inflation. Actual results may vary.
disclaimerProjection: Disclaimer: Projection assumes {{return}}% annual return. Actual results may vary. Investments involve risk.
annualSummaryLine: Based on 12 pay periods per year • {{amount}}/yr total
futureContributionsSubtitle: Small increases each year can create significant long-term impact.
autoIncreaseHeroTitle: Small yearly increases. Big retirement impact.
autoIncreaseHeroTitlePersonal: Ready to add {{amount}} more to your retirement?
autoIncreaseHeroSubtext: Increasing your contribution by 1% each year could add {{amount}} more by retirement.
autoIncreaseHeroSubtextPersonal: A 1% annual increase could significantly grow your future balance — automatically and gradually.
autoIncreaseConfirmationHeadline: Your contributions will now grow automatically.
autoIncreaseConfirmationSubtext: Your contribution will increase by 1% each year, so your savings grow without you having to remember.
autoIncreaseCustomizeDesc: You can adjust how your contributions grow over time.
autoIncreaseReinforcementWithSettings: With these settings, your retirement balance increases by {{amount}}.
skipModalBody: By skipping auto increase, you could miss out on an estimated {{amount}} in additional retirement savings.
autoIncreaseReinforcementLine: Most participants increase their contributions by 1% annually.
enableAutoIncreaseDesc: Your contribution will increase slightly once per year. You can change this anytime.
autoIncreaseEducationSubtitle: Small automatic increases add up to big results over time
strengthenFuture: Strengthen Your Future with Automatic Increases
changeLaterInPlanSettings: You can always change this later in your plan settings
autoIncreaseAiInsight: Small automatic increases today can add up to +{{amount}} in just {{years}} years — helping you enjoy a more comfortable retirement.
autoIncreaseTrustCopy: You can change or cancel anytime.
autoIncreaseReinforcement1: Most participants increase contributions by 1% annually.
stopIncreasingAtHelper: Auto-increase will stop once your contribution reaches this percentage.
doNotDropBelowHelper: Your contribution will not decrease below this percentage.
contributionsIncreaseToAndStop: Your contributions will gradually increase to {{percent}}% and stop there.
contributionNeverDropBelow: Your contribution will never drop below {{percent}}%.
validationStopAtMin: Must be at least your current contribution ({{percent}}%).
validationFloorMax: Must be at or below your current contribution.
validationFloorStopAt: Must be at or below stop increasing at.
withAnnualIncrease: With a {{percent}}% annual increase, you could accumulate
moreByAge: more by age {{age}}. That's an additional
assumesReturn: Assumes {{rate}}% annual return. Actual results may vary.
setContributionToContinue: Set your contribution amount on the previous step to see your auto-increase projection.
reviewSubtitle: Here's what your future could look like based on today's decisions.

review.title: You're Almost Done!
review.subtitle: Review your enrollment summary and confirm to complete your retirement plan setup.
review.finalConfirmationDesc: Review your selections above, then confirm to complete enrollment.

reviewReadyTitle: Your retirement plan is ready. Review and confirm.
reviewReadySubtitle: Take a moment to look over your selections below. You can make changes before completing your enrollment.
strongPath: Based on your current selections, you're on a strong path. Small adjustments today can have outsized impact over {{years}} years of compounding growth.
autoIncreaseNotConfigured: Automatic annual increase is not configured.
autoIncreaseNotEnabledDescription: You chose not to enable automatic contribution increases.
acceptTerms: Please accept the terms to enable enrollment.
termsAndConditionsAgree: By proceeding, you agree to comply with the plan rules and applicable regulations. You understand that investments involve market risk and that you are responsible for your allocation and contribution decisions.
contributionsStartDesc: Deductions begin on the first payroll cycle following the 15th of next month.
processingTimeDesc: Takes 1–2 pay periods to reflect on your pay stub.
modifyAnytimeDesc: Change your contribution rate or investment elections at any time.
goToContributions: Go to Contributions to apply this change.
goToInvestments: Go to Investment Elections to apply this change.
portfolioStability: Your portfolio favors stability with measured growth potential.
portfolioGrowth: Your portfolio is positioned for higher growth with greater market exposure.
insightsFromPlanData: Insights generated from your plan data.
contributionsBeginNextPaycheck: Your contributions will begin with your next paycheck.
completeAllSections: Complete all sections and accept terms to activate.
insightIncreasePreTaxDesc: Adding 2% more to your pre-tax contribution could close approximately 40% of any projected shortfall.
insightTargetDate: Simplify with a Target Date Fund
insightTargetDateDesc: A single Target Retirement Fund automatically adjusts risk as you approach retirement age.
investmentElectionsSubtitle: Choose how your contributions are invested.
chooseHowInvested: Choose how your contributions are invested
selectOrCustomizeAllocation: Select or customize where your retirement contributions are allocated.
balanceGrowthStability: Balance growth and stability based on your risk comfort.
customizeMyAllocationDesc: When enabled, you can manually adjust fund allocations.
disablingCustomizationReset: Disabling customization will reset your allocation to the recommended strategy. Continue?
customizeRecommendedAllocation: Select or adjust fund allocations for each contribution source.
advisorHelpDesc: Get personalized recommendations based on your goals.
advisorDescOptimize: Based on your age and retirement goals, we can automatically build and rebalance a portfolio tailored to you.
noFundsInSource: No funds in this source. Add a fund to get started.
readinessSubtext: You're projected to reach {{percent}}% of your retirement goal.
shortfallExplanation: Based on your current contributions and assumptions, there is a projected gap between your goal and this balance. Consider increasing contributions or adjusting your timeline.
projectionsDisclaimer: Projections are estimates and not guaranteed.
reviewSubtitleInstitutional: Finalize your 2025 retirement strategy and investment allocations.
strategyOptimizedHorizon: Strategy optimized for a 20-year horizon based on your current demographic profile.
entityVerificationDesc: HR will validate enrollment details against institutional policy (approx. 48h).
payrollIntegrationDesc: Direct deduction starts on the next calendar pay cycle automatically.
assetFundingDesc: Allocations are executed at the next trade window after payroll sync.
confirmReviewInstitutional: I confirm that I have reviewed my 2025 institutional portfolio allocation. I understand that investment involves risk, and I acknowledge the Participant Disclosure Agreement and plan administrative fee structure.
reducesFundingGap: Reduces funding gap by $85K over 10 years

personalizePlan.title: Hi, {{name}} 👋
personalizePlan.subtitle: Let's personalize your retirement journey.
personalizePlan.exitConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to exit setup?
personalizePlan.exitConfirmBody: Your progress will be saved. You can pick up where you left off anytime.
personalizePlan.step1DobHelper: Your age updates automatically based on this date.
personalizePlan.step1Question: At what age would you like to retire?
personalizePlan.step1SummaryYears: Retiring at {{age}} means you have {{years}} years until retirement.
personalizePlan.step2Sub: Your location helps us estimate cost of living and plan smarter.
personalizePlan.step2SmartChoiceFlorida: Florida is a popular retirement destination. With no state income tax and warm weather year-round, you could save $15,000+ annually on taxes alone.
personalizePlan.step2ValidationLocation: Please select or enter a retirement location.
personalizePlan.step3Sub: Sharing this helps us give you a clearer picture of your future.
personalizePlan.step3Helper: Exclude 401(k), IRA, pension - only include personal savings and investments
personalizePlan.step3GreatStartWithValue: Every dollar counts! With ${{amount}} saved and {{years}} years until retirement, consistent contributions can grow this significantly through compound interest.
personalizePlan.step3GreatStartGeneric: Every dollar counts! Enter your current retirement savings to see how it can grow with compound interest.
personalizePlan.validationRetirementAge: Retirement age must be after your current age.
